calls.notes: Merges { fileType } into state.filters via functional setState; triggers re-render.

Pure function called during render() (line 965). If filters.fileType is non-empty, filters documents array by exact MIME match (d.file_type === filters.fileType). Also applies searchQuery filter in same pass.

dataOrigin.note: The documents array filtered here was loaded once at componentDidMount via loadDocuments(). No API call is made when the filter changes.
